use_cases: Full-page decorative backgrounds for landing pages and hero sections
Visual enhancement for creative portfolios and agency websites
Ambient backgrounds for SaaS dashboards and marketing sites
Dynamic backdrop for media and entertainment platforms
Artistic canvas decoration for any Next.js application
ai_summary: A dynamic canvas-based background component that renders organic, blobby paint-like shapes with soft shadows and blend modes. The component auto-generates randomized geometric forms in pastel tones for light mode and deep jewel tones for dark mode, creating an artistic, fluid aesthetic suitable for hero sections and decorative backgrounds.
